text: Extension is not working. Can you find out what's the problem and fix it?

Here's what I found. The extension has several issues, some already fixed in the working tree but not committed, and one remaining backend dependency:

## Issues Found

### 1. Missing background service worker (CRITICAL - already fixed in working tree)
The committed `manifest.json` had no `background` block at all. The fix was:
- Added `"background": { "service_worker": "background.js" }` to manifest.json
- Created `background.js` (new file) to handle the `open_options` message

Without this, cl
Yes, all code is pushed. The branch `feature/yes-fedecc36` is up to date with the remote. The only local change is `.rea-context.json` (a metadata file), which is not committed.

The `.rea-context.json` file is a metadata file generated by the Claude Code agent framework (tracking conversation/task context). It's not part of the extension source code, so it was left uncommitted intentionally — committing it would add noise to the git history without any benefit to the extension itself.

All actual extension code (manifest.json, background.js, popup.js, etc.) is committed and pushed.
The light dark mode is literally causing my entire chrome browser to switch to dark mode. Every website is switching to dark mode. It should only stick to this extension. Can you fix this?
